This website uses cookies to enhance user experience and to analyze performance and traffic on our website. Additional information about data collection is available in our
privacy policy.
Manage Consent Preferences
Accept All Cookies
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

analysis.name: Airbase
analysis.value_proposition: Unified spend management platform covering corporate cards, bill pay, and expense reimbursements — now part of Paylocity's HR/Finance suite.
analysis.ideal_customer: Mid-market finance teams (100–5000 employees) seeking unified non-payroll spend control with ERP sync

features.name: corporate cards
features.description: Virtual and physical corporate cards with per-card spend controls and limits
features.evidence_quote: Airbase corporate cards with real-time spend controls

features.name: bill pay
features.description: Accounts payable workflow including invoice capture, approval routing, and vendor payments
features.evidence_quote: Manage all bill payments from a single platform

features.name: expense reimbursements
features.description: Employee out-of-pocket expense submission, approval, and reimbursement
features.evidence_quote: Expense reimbursements managed alongside cards and bills

features.name: purchase orders
features.description: PO creation, approval workflows, and PO-to-invoice matching
features.evidence_quote: Purchase order management with multi-step approvals

features.description: Configurable approval chains for spend requests before money moves
features.evidence_quote: Customizable multi-step approval workflows for all spend types

features.name: vendor management
features.description: Central vendor database with payment details, w9/w8 collection, and history
features.evidence_quote: Centralized vendor management and payment history

features.name: receipt capture
features.description: Mobile receipt photo capture and auto-matching to transactions
features.evidence_quote: Mobile receipt capture with automatic transaction matching

features.name: real-time spend visibility
features.description: Live dashboard showing all company spend across cards, bills, and reimbursements
features.evidence_quote: Real-time visibility into all company spend

features.name: erp sync
features.description: Bidirectional sync with ERP/accounting systems including GL coding
features.evidence_quote: Sync transactions to your ERP with correct GL coding automatically

features.name: budget management
features.description: Department and team-level budgets with real-time tracking against actuals
features.evidence_quote: Set and track budgets at the department and team level

features.name: virtual card issuance
features.description: Instant virtual card creation for one-time or recurring vendor payments
features.evidence_quote: Issue virtual cards instantly for any vendor or purpose

features.name: subscription management
features.description: Track and manage recurring SaaS and vendor subscriptions
features.evidence_quote: Manage all recurring software and vendor subscriptions

features.name: audit trail
features.description: Full immutable log of all spend requests, approvals, and changes
features.evidence_quote: Complete audit trail for every transaction and approval

features.name: role-based access control
features.description: Granular permissions controlling who can view, request, approve, or pay
features.evidence_quote: Role-based permissions with granular access controls

features.name: sso

features.evidence_quote: SAML SSO support for enterprise identity providers

features.name: international payments
features.description: Cross-border vendor payments in multiple currencies
features.evidence_quote: Pay international vendors in their local currency

features.evidence_quote: Send ACH payments directly from Airbase

differentiators: Unified platform covering cards, bill pay, and reimbursements in one product (vs. point solutions)
Part of Paylocity — native HCM/payroll data sync for employee-level spend management
Pre-approval workflows that stop unauthorized spend before it happens

praised: Unified spend management eliminating need for multiple tools
Virtual card issuance for easy vendor control
Good ERP integrations, especially NetSuite sync
complaints: Pricing opacity — no self-serve pricing, requires sales engagement
Mobile app historically weaker than desktop experience
Post-Paylocity acquisition: product direction and support changes cited
